zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Lovel Lord of Cary於1140年之前出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特時，他的父親Ralph Lovel40歲，母親Margaret Hawick29歲。他於1165年與Alis Cary在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於1194年之前在英國英格蘭薩默塞特卡素 加里。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Lovel Lord of Cary于1140年之前出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特时，他的父亲Ralph Lovel40岁，母亲Margaret Hawick29岁。他于1165年与Alis Cary在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他去世于1194年之前在英国英格兰薩默塞特卡素 加里。

nameMeanings.name: Lovel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Lovell
meanings: English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lovel ‘wolf cub’, a diminutive of lou, love ‘wolf’. Compare Love and Low .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Lovel Lord of Cary was born before 1140, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph Lovel, was 40 and his mother, Margaret Hawick, was 29. He married Alis Cary in 1165, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died before 1194, in Castle Cary, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Lovel Lord of Cary est né avant 1140, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph Lovel, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Margaret Hawick, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Alis Cary en 1165, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il est décédé avant 1194, à Castle Cary, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Lui sposato Alis Cary nel 1165, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì prima del 1194, nel Castle Cary, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Lovel Lord of Caryが1140年以前にイギリスイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父Ralph Lovelは40歳，母Margaret Hawickは29歳であった。1165年にイギリスイギリスでAlis Caryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼は1194年以前にイギリスイギリスソメルセトカストル カーイで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Lovel Lord of Cary(이)가 1140년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Lovel(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Hawick(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1165년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Alis Cary(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1194년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 카스틀 카리에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Lovel Lord of Cary nasceu antes 1140, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph Lovel, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Hawick, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Alis Cary em 1165, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ele faleceu antes 1194, em Castle Cary, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Lovel Lord of Cary родился перед 1140 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralph Lovel было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Hawick, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Alis Cary в 1165 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он умер перед 1194 г. в местности кастл кэри, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
